usage: addSplitPowerVia [-help] [-edgeLength {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...}] [-forceCount] [-localCheckerBoard] [-master <cell_name>] [-maxViaSize {x y}] [-maxWireLength {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...}] [-maxWireSpacing {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...}] [-mergeCount {x y}] [-mergeDistance {x y}] [-minEnclosure] [-minViaSize {x y}] [-minWireLength {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...}] [-minWireSpacing {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...}] [-pinLayer {layer1 layer2 ...}] [-prerouteAlign {none samelayer alllayer}] [-snap_wire_center_to_grid {layer1 {none | grid | half_grid | either} layer2 {none | grid | half_grid | either} ...}] [-stackedCheckerBoard] [-uda <userDefinedAttribute>] [-wireCount {layer1 value1|auto layer2 value2|auto ...}] [-wireOffset {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...}] [-wireWidth {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...}] [-delete | -wires_only]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -delete
options.description: Deletes the via for selected wires/objects

options.name: -edgeLength
options.description: {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...} the extension length of the wires for each layer in um

options.name: -forceCount
options.description: Forces the tool to generate the given wirecount even if the wires extend beyond the overlap area

options.name: -localCheckerBoard
options.description: allow local checkerboard cut generation rather than matching the global checkerboard pattern

options.name: -master
options.description: add jenga wires and vias between paralell wires, over the specified stdcell

options.name: -maxViaSize
options.description: max via size

options.name: -maxWireLength
options.description: {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...} the max length of the wires for each layer in um

options.name: -maxWireSpacing
options.description: {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...} the max wire spacing of wires for each layer in um

options.name: -mergeCount
options.description: merge neighboring wire count

options.name: -mergeDistance
options.description: merging distance in x and y direction

options.name: -minEnclosure
options.description: Create the shortest wires that meet DRC rules rather than the default wire length of the entire overlap area

options.name: -minViaSize
options.description: min via size

options.name: -minWireLength
options.description: {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...} the min length of the wires for each layer in um

options.name: -minWireSpacing
options.description: {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...} the min wire spacing of wires for each layer in um

options.name: -pinLayer
options.description: list of pin layers in a macro used to create via with crossover wire

options.name: -prerouteAlign
options.description: {none samelayer alllayer} Defines the alignment of via wires with preexisting wires on the same net

options.name: -snap_wire_center_to_grid
options.description: {layer1 {none | grid | half_grid | either} layer2 {none | grid | half_grid | either} ...} specifies the wire center alignment style for middle layer jenga wires

options.name: -stackedCheckerBoard
options.description: Create the stacked checker board vias between intermediate layers

options.name: -uda
options.description: add the user defined attribute to the to-be-built jenga wires and vias

options.name: -wireCount
options.description: {layer1 value1|auto layer2 value2|auto ...} the count of wires for each layer in integer

options.name: -wireOffset
options.description: {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...} wire offset away from the intersection of selected wires

options.name: -wireWidth
options.description: {layer1 value1 layer2 value2 ...} the width of the wires for each layer in um

options.name: -wires_only
options.description: only output jenga wires without violations
